lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Good day, brother.

lines.speaker: Brother Brace
lines.text: Hello, I'm Brother Brace. I'm here to tell you all about Prayer.

lines.speaker: Brother Brace
lines.text: You should open the indicated menu to continue.

lines.speaker: Brother Brace
lines.text: This is your Prayer list. Prayers can help a lot in combat. Click on the prayer you wish to use to activate it, and click it again to deactivate it.

lines.speaker: Brother Brace
lines.text: Active prayers will drain your Prayer Points, which you can recharge by finding an altar or other holy spot and praying there.

lines.speaker: Brother Brace
lines.text: As you noticed, most enemies will drop bones when defeated. Burying bones, by clicking them in your inventory, will gain you Prayer experience.

lines.speaker: Brother Brace
lines.text: I'm also the community officer 'round here, so it's my job to tell you about your friends and ignore lists.

lines.speaker: Brother Brace
lines.text: You should open the indicated menu to continue.

lines.speaker: Brother Brace
lines.text: Right. Now I'll tell you a little about each list. You can add people to either list by clicking the add button then typing their name into the box that appears.

lines.speaker: Brother Brace
lines.text: You remove people from the lists in the same way. If you add someone to your ignore list they will not be able to talk to you or send any form of message to you.

lines.speaker: Brother Brace
lines.text: Your friends list shows the online status of your friends. Friends in red are offline, friends in green are online and on the same world and friends in yellow are online, but on a different world.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, thanks, I'll bear that in mind.

lines.speaker: Brother Brace
lines.text: Peace be with you, my child. Can I help you?

lines.speaker: Brother Brace
lines.text: Ah, yes, your prayer list. Prayers can help a lot in combat. Click on the prayer you wish to use to activate it, and click it again to deactivate it.

lines.speaker: Brother Brace
lines.text: Active prayers will drain your Prayer Points, which you can recharge by finding an altar or other holy spot and praying there.

lines.speaker: Brother Brace
lines.text: As you noticed, most enemies will drop bones when defeated. Burying bones, by clicking them in your inventory, will gain you Prayer experience.

lines.speaker: Brother Brace
lines.text: Do you need anything else?

lines.speaker: Brother Brace
lines.text: Your friends and ignore lists, yes... I'll tell you a little about each. You can add people to either list by clicking the add button then typing their name into the box that appears.

lines.speaker: Brother Brace
lines.text: You remove people from the lists in the same way. If you add someone to your ignore list they will not be able to talk to you or send any form of message to you.

lines.speaker: Brother Brace
lines.text: Your friends list shows the online status of your friends. Friends in red are offline, friends in green are online and on the same world and friends in yellow are online, but on a different world.

lines.speaker: Brother Brace
lines.text: Do you need anything else?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Nope, I'm ready to move on!

lines.speaker: Brother Brace
lines.text: Okay then.
